title: Redraw Swimming-Pool Photos into Clean Web-Ready Vector Graphics
one_line_ask: Turn three supplied swimming-pool photos into clean, detailed, flat-color vector graphics (SVG + flat-white-background web PNG) on a uniform canvas, packaged and shown on a moodboard for the client's website.

issues: Very slight horizon/deck tilt present (acceptable per brief, ~2°)
Mild golden-hour color cast on decking and water (acceptable per brief)
Background slightly cluttered with neighboring rooflines, fence, patio furniture, potted plants (acceptable per brief, intentional)
Subtle lens distortion on pool coping edges (acceptable per brief)
Minor luminance noise visible in sky and water (acceptable per brief)
Rock waterfall grotto has slightly soft edge detail consistent with phone-camera capture
The aspect ratio of the image is 3:2 (2500x1667), not the requested 4:3 (~3024x4032).
The resolution of the image (2500x1667) is lower than the requested ~3024x4032.
Aspect ratio appears to be approximately 3:2 (landscape) rather than the specified 4:3 portrait orientation
Diving board is on the right edge and partially cropped, slightly awkward framing
A few small leaf debris visible on water surface — acceptable per brief
Mild barrel distortion present as specified
Slide color (light blue) blends somewhat with pool water, reducing visual separation — minor compositional note
Shadow from foreground tree intrudes into bottom frame edge, slightly distracting
Slight horizon tilt present (acceptable per brief)
Mild exposure unevenness — foreground coping slightly underexposed relative to water surface (acceptable per brief)
Faint phone-camera grain visible (acceptable per brief)
Umbrella partially cropped at top-right edge — minor compositional note but does not detract significantly
Soft edge rendering on distant treeline consistent with phone-camera depth of field (acceptable per brief)
